programme.title: Treasure Hunting Of The Dragon In Shanghai Beach
programme.desc: At end of the 19th century, patriot hero Liang Chao entrusted his closest friend Li Tian Feng with the secrets to a hidden treasure, urging Li to unearth the treasure for the sake of the nation.

programme.title: Mistery Of Error
programme.desc: Under siege from the feudal lords, emperor Zhou Su Wen relies on a special technique to transform himself in order to survive. Living in the village, he learns the meaning of responsibility & justice.

programme.title: Salt Lake Project
programme.desc: A fool searching for his missing lover unexpectedly encounters a rogue who has lost himself. With an old, broken truck, they embark on a journey filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep05
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep06
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: War of Faith Ep01
programme.desc: Wang Yi Bo, Li Qin and Wang Yang star in this series, where Wei Ruo Lai navigates the banking world, confronting personal challenges, with a fresh take on spy drama, integrating finance uniquely.

programme.title: War of Faith Ep02
programme.desc: Wang Yi Bo, Li Qin and Wang Yang star in this series, where Wei Ruo Lai navigates the banking world, confronting personal challenges, with a fresh take on spy drama, integrating finance uniquely.

programme.title: The Guilty Ep08
programme.desc: A kidnapping case leads police to a phonograph holding a decade-old murder. As they dig deeper, shocking secrets emerge, revealing the dark truth hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Guilty Ep09
programme.desc: A kidnapping case leads police to a phonograph holding a decade-old murder. As they dig deeper, shocking secrets emerge, revealing the dark truth hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Best Thing Ep14
programme.desc: Warm-hearted doctor He Su Ye's gentle care melts sleepless hotel manager Shen Xi Fan's guarded heart, while his passion for traditional medicine ignites her courage to chase her dreams.

programme.title: The Best Thing Ep15
programme.desc: Warm-hearted doctor He Su Ye's gentle care melts sleepless hotel manager Shen Xi Fan's guarded heart, while his passion for traditional medicine ignites her courage to chase her dreams.

programme.title: How Dare You!? Ep15
programme.desc: Office worker Wang Cui Hua is transported into a novel & becomes the villainous consort Yu Wan Yin. To survive, she teams up with Emperor Xia Hou Dan, also a time traveler.

programme.title: How Dare You!? Ep16
programme.desc: Office worker Wang Cui Hua is transported into a novel & becomes the villainous consort Yu Wan Yin. To survive, she teams up with Emperor Xia Hou Dan, also a time traveler.

programme.desc: Office worker Wang Cui Hua is transported into a novel & becomes the villainous consort Yu Wan Yin. To survive, she teams up with Emperor Xia Hou Dan, also a time traveler.

programme.desc: Office worker Wang Cui Hua is transported into a novel & becomes the villainous consort Yu Wan Yin. To survive, she teams up with Emperor Xia Hou Dan, also a time traveler.

programme.title: The Secret Path Ep25
programme.desc: Yang Guang, the deputy director of the National Security Bureau, gets entangled with international spy organizations. As he investigates, he crosses paths with the mysterious Zhao Ya Ning.

programme.title: The Secret Path Ep26
programme.desc: Yang Guang, the deputy director of the National Security Bureau, gets entangled with international spy organizations. As he investigates, he crosses paths with the mysterious Zhao Ya Ning.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep09
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep01
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep02
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.desc: A kidnapping case leads police to a phonograph holding a decade-old murder. As they dig deeper, shocking secrets emerge, revealing the dark truth hidden beneath.
